title: hedysarum manaslense var. nepalense
intro: Hedysarum manaslense var. nepalense is a variant of the Hedysarum manaslense plant, commonly known as the Himalayan sweet pea or the Himalayan hedysarum. It is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive disorders, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Hedysarum manaslense var. nepalense is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
